name: prose-judge emits SARIF 2.1.0 with the OASIS schema and a result for the violation
command:
mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0099. Dev cluster networking

## Decision

We will leave dev-cluster ingress unrestricted (0.0.0.0/0) for convenience.
' > docs/adr/0099.md && out=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/prose-judge.sh" --rule g-aws-no-unrestricted-ingress --root . --paths docs/adr/0099.md --json 2>/dev/null); echo "$out" | grep -q '"version":"2.1.0"' && echo "$out" | grep -q 'sarif-schema-2.1.0' && echo "$out" | grep -q '"ruleId":"g-aws-no-unrestricted-ingress"' && echo sarif-ok 1>&2
